description: Traffic Accident Victims in France in 1958
proposed_title: Road Accident Fatality by Transport Mode and Age Group
encoding_note: Pre-aggregated table with Freq counts. result="Died" = failure (death); sum Freq where result="Died" = Deaths (Cases - Successes), sum all Freq = Cases, per (mode × age) cell. Alternatively use gender as stratum. Treatment = transport mode (4 levels: Pedestrian, Bicycle, Motorcycle, 4-Wheeled).
